entry.title: AhaSend
entry.description: AhaSend provides transactional and marketing email delivery with a generous free tier for small projects and startups.

freeTierDetails.summary: Send up to 3,000 emails per month for free with access to core features.
caveats: No dedicated IP on free tier
Branding may be included in emails

useCases: Sending transactional emails from web apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free AhaSend account.
Verify your email address and domain.
Create an API key or obtain SMTP credentials.
Integrate AhaSend with your application or email client.
Send a test email to confirm setup.
entry.whenToUse: Use AhaSend when you need a simple, cost-effective solution for sending transactional or marketing emails with generous free limits.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced deliverability features, dedicated IPs, or need to send high email volumes beyond the free tier.
entry.body: AhaSend offers a free tier for sending up to 3,000 emails monthly, making it suitable for small projects needing reliable email delivery.

entry.title: Brevo
entry.description: Brevo offers email marketing, transactional email, and SMS services with a generous free tier for small-scale campaigns.

freeTierDetails.summary: Send up to 300 emails per day with core marketing features included.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Brevo account.
Verify your email address.
Create or import your contact list.
Design your first email campaign using the template editor.
Send a test email and launch your campaign.
entry.whenToUse: Use Brevo when you need to send marketing or transactional emails at low volume without upfront costs.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Brevo if you require advanced automation, high daily sending limits, or white-labeling on the free plan.
entry.body: Brevo provides a robust free tier for email marketing and transactional messaging, making it suitable for small businesses and projects needing reliable email delivery without upfront costs.

entry.title: Burnermail
entry.description: Burnermail provides disposable email addresses to protect your real inbox from spam and unwanted emails.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan allows up to 5 active burner email addresses with basic forwarding features.
caveats: No custom domains on free plan

useCases: Sign up for online services without revealing your real email
Reduce spam in your main inbox
quickstartSteps: Go to https://burnermail.io/ and sign up for a free account.
Verify your email address to activate your account.
Create a new burner email address from your dashboard.
Use the burner address to sign up for services or receive emails.
Check your dashboard to view forwarded emails.
entry.whenToUse: Use Burnermail when you need to protect your real email from spam or want to sign up for services anonymously.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Burnermail if you require custom domains, unlimited addresses, or advanced email management features.
entry.body: Burnermail offers disposable email addresses to help users protect their privacy and reduce spam, with a free tier suitable for basic use cases.

entry.title: Buttondown
entry.description: Buttondown is a simple email newsletter service for creators and small businesses.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free for up to 1,000 subscribers with core features included.
caveats: No custom domains on free tier
Some advanced features require paid plan

useCases: Launching a personal or project newsletter
Building an audience for a blog or product
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Buttondown account.
Set up your newsletter name and description.
Customize your signup form and add it to your website.
Compose and send your first email to subscribers.
entry.whenToUse: Use Buttondown if you want a simple, privacy-focused newsletter tool with generous free limits and minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced marketing automation, deep analytics, or custom domain support on the free tier.
entry.body: Buttondown offers a lightweight, privacy-friendly platform for sending newsletters, ideal for creators and small projects needing a straightforward email solution.

entry.title: EmailJS
entry.description: Send emails directly from client-side JavaScript without a backend using pre-configured email services.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows up to 200 email sends per month with basic support.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free EmailJS account.
Connect your email service (e.g., Gmail, Outlook) in the dashboard.
Create an email template for your messages.
Install the EmailJS SDK in your project.
Configure and call the send function in your JavaScript code.
entry.whenToUse: Use EmailJS when you need to send emails from frontend apps without a backend server.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need high email volumes, advanced deliverability, or backend-triggered emails.
entry.body: EmailJS enables sending emails from client-side JavaScript by connecting to popular email services, ideal for static sites and simple frontend forms.

entry.title: Ethereal Email
entry.description: Ethereal Email provides free, disposable SMTP accounts for testing email sending in development environments.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited free disposable SMTP accounts for email testing.
limits: Emails are auto-deleted after a few hours
caveats: Emails are accessible publicly if account credentials are shared
Not suitable for sending emails to real users
billingRiskNotes: No billing required; service is always free

quickstartSteps: Visit https://ethereal.email and click 'Create Ethereal Account'.
Copy the generated SMTP credentials.
Configure your application or email library with these credentials.
Send a test email from your application.
Log in to Ethereal Email with your credentials to view received emails.
entry.whenToUse: Use Ethereal Email when you need to test email sending in development without sending real emails.
entry.whenNotToUse: Do not use for production or sending emails to real users, as emails are not delivered outside Ethereal.
entry.body: Ethereal Email is a free service that provides disposable SMTP accounts for safely testing email functionality in development environments, without risk of spamming real users.

entry.title: Imitate Email
entry.description: Imitate Email provides a fake SMTP server for testing email sending in development environments without sending real emails.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows basic email testing with limited inboxes and messages.
caveats: No team collaboration on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Imitate Email account.
Create a new inbox from the dashboard.
Configure your app's SMTP settings to use the provided server and credentials.
Send a test email from your application.
View and debug received emails in the Imitate Email dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to safely test email sending from your app without delivering real emails to users.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid for production email delivery or when testing with actual user inboxes is required.
entry.body: Imitate Email is a developer-focused fake SMTP server that captures and displays outgoing emails for safe testing, debugging, and previewing during application development.

entry.title: MailerLite
entry.description: MailerLite offers email marketing, automation, and newsletter tools with a generous free tier for small businesses and creators.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes up to 1,000 subscribers and 12,000 monthly emails with core features.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free MailerLite account.
Verify your email and complete the account approval process.
Import or add your subscriber list (up to 1,000).
Create your first email campaign or automation workflow.
Send or schedule your campaign.
entry.whenToUse: Use MailerLite if you need simple, reliable email marketing for up to 1,000 subscribers with basic automation and reporting.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced automation, higher deliverability, or need to send to large lists without MailerLite branding.
entry.body: MailerLite is a user-friendly email marketing platform with a generous free tier, ideal for small businesses and creators needing basic automation and newsletters.

entry.title: MailerSend.com
entry.description: MailerSend provides transactional email API and tools with a generous free tier for developers and small businesses.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 3,000 emails per month with core features and API access.
caveats: No dedicated IP on free tier
billingRiskNotes: Sending above 3,000 emails/month requires upgrading to a paid plan

useCases: Send transactional emails from web or mobile apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free MailerSend account.
Verify your sending domain via DNS records.
Generate an API token from the dashboard.
Integrate MailerSend API or SMTP into your app.
Send a test transactional email.
entry.whenToUse: Use MailerSend when you need reliable transactional email delivery with a generous free tier and simple API integration.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced deliverability features, dedicated IPs, or high-volume sending beyond the free tier.
entry.body: MailerSend offers a robust transactional email platform with a generous free tier, making it ideal for developers and small teams needing reliable email delivery.

entry.title: Mailgun
entry.description: Mailgun provides APIs for sending, receiving, and tracking email at scale for applications and businesses.

freeTierDetails.summary: 5,000 free emails per month for 3 months, then paid plans apply.
billingRiskNotes: Charges apply automatically after free period ends

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a Mailgun account and verify your email.
Add and verify your sending domain.
Obtain your API key from the dashboard.
Integrate Mailgun API or SMTP into your application.
Send a test email to confirm setup.
entry.whenToUse: Use Mailgun when you need reliable, scalable email delivery with API or SMTP integration for apps or services.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need a long-term free tier, or if you require advanced features without entering payment details.
entry.body: Mailgun is a popular email delivery service offering APIs and SMTP relay for sending, receiving, and tracking transactional emails. The free tier allows new users to send up to 5,000 emails per month for the first three months, making it suitable for testing and early-stage projects. After the trial, charges apply automatically, so monitor usage and billing settings. Mailgun is best for developers and teams needing reliable email delivery, but not ideal for those seeking a permanent free solution.

entry.title: Mailinator.com
entry.description: Mailinator provides public and private disposable email inboxes for testing and temporary email needs.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier offers unlimited access to public inboxes with basic features.
limits: Messages deleted after a few hours
caveats: Anyone can read emails in public inboxes

quickstartSteps: Go to https://www.mailinator.com/.
Enter any public inbox name in the search bar.
Send a test email to <chosen-inbox>@mailinator.com.
Refresh the inbox to view received emails.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to quickly test email delivery or receive disposable emails without sign-up.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid for sensitive or private data, or if you require private inboxes or API access.
entry.body: Mailinator is a disposable email service offering public inboxes for testing and temporary use, ideal for development and QA scenarios but not for sensitive data.

entry.title: Mailjet
entry.description: Mailjet provides transactional and marketing email services with APIs, SMTP relay, and analytics for developers and businesses.

freeTierDetails.summary: Send up to 200 emails per day for free with core features included.
caveats: Daily sending limit resets every 24 hours
No dedicated IP or advanced segmentation

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Mailjet account.
Verify your email address and domain.
Create an API key from the dashboard.
Integrate Mailjet API or SMTP with your app.
Send a test email to confirm setup.
entry.whenToUse: Use Mailjet when you need reliable transactional or marketing email delivery with easy API or SMTP integration and a generous free tier.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Mailjet if you require high daily volumes, advanced automation, or white-labeling without branding on the free plan.
entry.body: Mailjet offers a straightforward, always-free tier for sending up to 200 emails per day, making it suitable for small projects, transactional notifications, and basic marketing campaigns. The platform provides both API and SMTP integration, with basic analytics and support for essential email features. The free plan includes Mailjet branding and lacks advanced segmentation or dedicated IPs, so it's best for low-volume or early-stage use cases.

entry.title: Mailsac.com
entry.description: Mailsac provides disposable email inboxes and testing APIs for safe, automated email testing and development.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes public inboxes, limited message retention, and basic API access.
caveats: Public inboxes are visible to anyone

useCases: QA for signup and notification emails
quickstartSteps: Go to https://mailsac.com and sign up for a free account.
Access a public inbox by choosing any email address ending with @mailsac.com.
Send a test email to the chosen address.
Check the inbox for received messages and view email content.
Optionally, use the API to automate inbox checks.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to test email sending or workflows without using real email addresses or risking spam.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require private inboxes, custom domains, or production-grade email delivery and security.
entry.body: Mailsac offers disposable public inboxes and APIs for safe, automated email testing, making it ideal for development and QA environments without risking real user data.

entry.title: Mailtrap.io
entry.description: Mailtrap.io provides a safe email testing environment for staging and development, preventing accidental email delivery to real users.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes a single inbox with limited monthly emails for safe email testing.
caveats: No team collaboration on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Mailtrap.io account.
Create a new inbox in your Mailtrap dashboard.
Copy the SMTP credentials provided for your inbox.
Configure your application to use Mailtrap's SMTP settings.
Send a test email and verify it appears in your Mailtrap inbox.
entry.whenToUse: Use Mailtrap.io when you need to safely test and debug email sending in development or staging environments.
entry.whenNotToUse: Do not use for sending emails to real users or in production environments, as emails are not delivered externally.
avoidIf: you need to send real emails
entry.body: Mailtrap.io is a developer-focused tool for safely testing and debugging email sending without risk of spamming real users. Its free tier is ideal for individual developers or small teams needing to validate email flows in non-production environments, offering a single inbox and generous monthly limits. Mailtrap is easy to integrate with most frameworks and languages, making it a popular choice for email testing during development.

entry.title: Mutant Mail
entry.description: Mutant Mail provides unified email management, forwarding, and reply capabilities for multiple domains from a single inbox.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows management of up to 1 domain and 10 email aliases with basic forwarding and reply features.

useCases: Centralize email management for multiple domains
Protect personal email addresses with aliases
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Mutant Mail account.
Add and verify your domain following the DNS instructions.
Create email aliases as needed.
Configure forwarding to your preferred inbox.
Test sending and replying to emails via your aliases.
entry.whenToUse: Use Mutant Mail to manage multiple domain emails and aliases from a single inbox without running your own mail server.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced email hosting, high-volume sending, or custom branding on the free tier.
entry.body: Mutant Mail enables users to manage, forward, and reply to emails for multiple domains and aliases from a single inbox, streamlining email workflows and protecting privacy.

entry.title: Plunk
entry.description: Plunk offers instant static site hosting with automatic HTTPS and GitHub integration for fast project deployment.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes unlimited sites with basic features and bandwidth limits.
caveats: Custom domains may require paid plan

quickstartSteps: Sign up at useplunk.com with your GitHub account.
Create a new site and connect your GitHub repository.
Configure build settings if needed.
Deploy your site and access the provided URL.
entry.whenToUse: Use Plunk for quickly deploying static sites or documentation with GitHub integration and minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need backend/server-side functionality or expect high bandwidth or storage requirements.
entry.body: Plunk is a simple static site hosting platform with GitHub integration, automatic HTTPS, and a generous free tier for small projects.

entry.title: Postmark
entry.description: Postmark provides reliable transactional email delivery with detailed analytics and fast delivery times.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free trial includes 100 emails for testing Postmark's transactional email service.
caveats: No always-free tier; trial is for testing only

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a Postmark account.
Verify your email domain.
Create a new server in the Postmark dashboard.
Obtain your server API token.
Integrate Postmark with your app using SMTP or API.
entry.whenToUse: Use Postmark when you need reliable, fast transactional email delivery with simple integration and analytics.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need a permanent free tier or plan to send large volumes without paying.
entry.body: Postmark offers a developer-friendly transactional email service with a free trial for testing, fast delivery, and detailed analytics, ideal for app notifications and password resets.

entry.title: Proton Mail
entry.description: Proton Mail offers secure, privacy-focused email hosting with end-to-end encryption and a free tier for personal use.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes 1 user, 1 GB storage, and limited daily messages.
caveats: No IMAP/SMTP support on free tier

quickstartSteps: Go to https://proton.me/mail and click 'Sign Up'.
Select the Free plan and create your account.
Verify your email address if prompted.
Set up your mailbox and security preferences.
Start sending and receiving encrypted emails.
entry.whenToUse: Use Proton Mail when you need a secure, privacy-focused email service for personal or small-scale use without custom domains.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require custom domains, high daily email volume, or IMAP/SMTP access for integration with other clients.
entry.body: Proton Mail provides encrypted email hosting with a free tier suitable for individuals prioritizing privacy and basic email needs.

entry.title: Resend

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 3,000 emails per month with core features.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a Resend account.
Add and verify your sending domain.

Send a test email to confirm setup.

entry.title: SendGrid
entry.description: SendGrid provides reliable transactional and marketing email delivery with APIs and analytics.

freeTierDetails.summary: Send up to 100 emails per day for free with API access and basic analytics.

Integrate SendGrid API into your application using official libraries.

entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need to send high volumes, require advanced deliverability features, or need a dedicated IP on the free tier.
entry.body: SendGrid offers a generous free tier for sending up to 100 emails per day, making it ideal for development, testing, and low-volume transactional email needs. Verify your email address and log in.

Create and send your first email campaign.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes up to 10,000 notifications per month across all channels.

entry.title: Sweego
entry.description: Sweego offers free, no-code website hosting with built-in analytics and simple deployment for static sites.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free static site hosting with analytics and no-code deployment.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Sweego account.
Create a new site and choose a template or upload your static files.
Configure site settings and preview your site.
Publish your site with one click.
Monitor analytics from the dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Sweego when you need to quickly deploy a static website without coding or server setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Sweego if you require backend functionality, custom domains on the free tier, or advanced deployment workflows.

entry.title: Temp-mail.io
entry.description: Temp-mail.io provides disposable email addresses for temporary registration, testing, or privacy protection.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free disposable email addresses with inbox access and basic features.
caveats: Emails are deleted after a short period

useCases: Registering on websites without exposing your real email
quickstartSteps: Go to https://temp-mail.io.
Copy the generated temporary email address.
Use the address to register or receive emails on any website.
Check the inbox on Temp-mail.io for incoming messages.
Delete or refresh the email address as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use Temp-mail.io when you need a quick, disposable email for signups, testing, or to protect your personal inbox.
entry.whenNotToUse: Do not use for important, long-term, or sensitive communications, as emails are deleted quickly and privacy is not guaranteed.
entry.body: Temp-mail.io offers free, disposable email addresses for temporary use, ideal for signups, testing, and privacy protection, but not suitable for important or persistent communication.

entry.description: Temp-Mail.org provides disposable email addresses for temporary registration, testing, or privacy protection.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free, unlimited disposable email addresses with inbox access.
caveats: Some services may block temp emails

Avoiding spam in your main inbox

Copy the generated temporary email address.
Use the address to register or receive emails as needed.
Check the inbox on Temp-Mail.org for incoming messages.
Delete or refresh the address when finished.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need a quick, disposable email for signups, testing, or privacy without creating an account.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid for important, long-term, or secure communications, as inboxes are public and temporary.
entry.body: Temp-Mail.org offers free, disposable email addresses for temporary use, ideal for signups, testing, and protecting your primary inbox from spam.

entry.title: TempMailDetector.com
entry.description: Detects and blocks temporary or disposable email addresses in real time via API.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows up to 100 API requests per month.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free account at TempMailDetector.com.
Log in and obtain your API key from the dashboard.
Read the API documentation for integration details.
Integrate the API into your signup or registration flow.
Test with known disposable and real email addresses.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to block disposable or temporary emails during user registration or form submissions.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require bulk email validation or need to verify email deliverability, not just disposability.
entry.body: TempMailDetector.com provides a simple API to detect and block temporary or disposable email addresses, helping reduce spam and improve user quality.

entry.title: Trashmail.com
entry.description: Trashmail.com provides disposable email addresses to protect your real inbox from spam and unwanted messages.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows creation of disposable email addresses with limited forwarding and expiration options.
limits: Forwarding limit of 1 message per address
caveats: No custom domains on free tier

Register for a free account or use without registration.

Check your real inbox for forwarded messages.

entry.title: Verimail.io

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 100 email verifications per month.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Verimail.io account.
Log in and generate your API key from the dashboard.
Read the API documentation for integration details.
Send email addresses to the API endpoint for validation.
Review results and handle invalid emails in your application.
entry.whenToUse: Use Verimail.io when you need to verify email addresses in real time to prevent invalid signups or reduce bounce rates.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require bulk verification of large lists beyond 100/month or need advanced deliverability analytics.
entry.body: Verimail.io offers a simple API for real-time email address validation, helping reduce bounce rates and improve email list quality for small projects.

entry.title: Webpushr
entry.description: Webpushr provides web push notification services for websites to engage users with real-time alerts and updates.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows up to 10,000 subscribers with unlimited notifications.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Webpushr account.
Add your website and configure its settings.
Integrate the Webpushr JavaScript code snippet into your site.
Customize notification prompts and messaging.
Send your first push notification from the dashboard.

entry.title: Zoho Campaigns

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes up to 2,000 subscribers and 6,000 emails per month.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a Zoho Campaigns account.
Verify your email address and log in.
Create or import your subscriber list.
Design your email campaign using templates.
Schedule or send your campaign.
entry.whenToUse: Use Zoho Campaigns when you need a simple, scalable solution for sending newsletters or automating basic email marketing.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced automation, deep integrations, or need to remove Zoho branding on the free plan.

entry.title: Zoho Email
entry.description: Zoho Email offers secure, ad-free business email hosting with a free tier for small teams and individuals.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes up to 5 users with 5GB/user and 25MB attachment limit, using a custom domain.
caveats: No IMAP/POP access on free plan
Limited to web and mobile app access

useCases: Custom domain email for small teams

Add and verify your custom domain.
Create user mailboxes (up to 5).
Update your domain's MX records as instructed.
Access your mailbox via Zoho web or mobile app.
